items.title: Oil prices rise as the U.S. cancels Iran’s license to sell oil
items.description: Oil futures climbed late Tuesday after the Treasury Department canceled a license granted on June 21 to allow for the sale of Iranian oil.

items.title: Apple is closing in on Nvidia as it looks to reclaim title of largest U.S. company
items.description: Once the face of the AI trade, Nvidia’s valuation has compressed to levels not seen since 2013 while Apple shares continue to power higher

items.title: I found a simple way to save money on frozen pizza. What’s your best money-saving trick?
‘Our family is broken beyond repair’: My brother took over my parents’ finances. What can I do?
items.description: “Without telling me, my brother petitioned for sole guardianship of our mother.”

items.title: Adobe’s stock is temptingly cheap. Should investors bite?
items.description: Adobe has become a polarizing stock in the face of questions about its AI future.

items.title: Elon Musk’s Terafab could give a major boost to this corner of the chip sector
items.description: SpaceX could spend about $135 billion on wafer-fab equipment over the next five years, UBS said.

items.title: Wednesday’s Fed minutes will be revealing — but not in the way investors hope
items.description: Minutes of the Fed’s June meeting will give more insight on how new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh intends to run the central bank.

items.title: It can take as little as 5 minutes online to get prescribed a GLP-1 for weight loss. Why that’s risky.
items.description: The research suggests that these companies prioritize “quick prescriptions” over good care

items.title: Bond traders are watching this tracker to figure out the real odds of Fed rate hikes
items.description: A Fed gauge of wage growth is due to be updated on Friday, followed by a June reading on consumer inflation next Tuesday.

items.title: Tesla’s stock could rise 20% thanks to the potential for a SpaceX merger, analyst says
items.description: Some on Wall Street see an increasing likelihood that Elon Musk’s two biggest companies will combine.
